meta.title: Jae Method | Honest Car Buying in Raleigh
meta.description: Find your perfect car with Seungkook Jae. No pressure, honest service. Korean & English. Fred Anderson Kia, Raleigh NC.

hero.tagline: Your honest car advisor in Raleigh
hero.subtitle: No pressure. No games. Just the right car for your life.

story.title: A Life Between Two Worlds
story.content: I served in the South Korean military, where I learned discipline and how to rebuild after mistakes. Then I took the biggest leap of my life — moving to America, a country whose language and culture I had never experienced. Every day was a solo adventure, figuring things out from scratch with nothing but determination. That journey taught me that trust is everything — in life and in car buying. When you work with me, you get honesty, patience, and someone who genuinely cares about finding the right car for YOUR life — not just making a sale.

values.title: Why Work With Me
values.honestDesc: I'll tell you the truth about every car — even if it means I don't make a sale.
values.noPressureDesc: Take your time. I'm here to help, not push.
values.bilingualDesc: Comfortable in both languages. 한국어로 편하게 상담하세요.
values.personalDesc: I remember your name, your family, and what matters to you.

quiz.title: Find Your Perfect Car
quiz.subtitle: Answer a few questions about your life, and I'll match you with the right vehicle.
quiz.resultsSubtitle: Based on your lifestyle, here are the best cars for you:
quiz.noMatch: No perfect matches right now — but let's talk! I can help you find exactly what you need.
quiz.closeMatch: These aren't a perfect match, but close — let's talk and find the right one for you.

q3.question: What do you do for fun?

q6.question: Which features matter to you?
q6.hint: Select all that apply — the more you pick, the better I can match you.

options.premium_audio: Premium Sound System (Harman Kardon, Bose, etc.)

q7.question: What's your monthly payment budget?
q7.hint: Quick rule: every $1,000 financed ≈ $20/month. So a $20K car ≈ $400/mo, a $30K car ≈ $600/mo.

tradeIn.title: Trade-In Your Vehicle
tradeIn.subtitle: Get a fair value for your current car. Upload photos and I'll give you an honest estimate.
